lines.english: Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Attachment to sex is an ocean of fire and pain.
I seek the Sanctuary of the Lotus Feet of the Lord.
By Your Grace, O Sublime Lord, please save me from it. ||1||
He is the Master of the meek, the Support of His devotees. ||1||Pause||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Messenger of Death cannot even touch them. ||2||
Master of the masterless, Patron of the forlorn, Eradicator of fear of His devotees.
One who constantly chants the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam with his tongue,
The Merciful, Incomparably Beautiful, Embodiment of Life.
Vibrating the Glorious Virtues of the Lord, the noose of the Messenger of Death is cut away. ||3||
is not touched or affected by Maya, the embodiment of disease. ||4||
the five thieves will not even approach. ||5||
Chant and meditate on God, the Lord of the Universe, and all of your companions shall be carried across;
Showering His Mercy, God has made me His own;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਚ ਕ੍ਰਮ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: man bach kram prabh ek dhiaae |
lines.english: One who meditates on the One God in thought, word and deed
- that humble being receives the fruits of all rewards. ||6||
In the beginning, in the middle, and in the end, He is God.
He has blessed me with the unique and singular Naam, and the sublime essence of devotion. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੮॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak tis bin avar na koee |8|1|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without Him, there is no other at all. ||8||1||2||
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Ninth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਡਿਠਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਸੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਿਨੑ ਸੰਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin dditthiaa man rahaseeai kiau paaeeai tina sang jeeo |
lines.english: Gazing upon them, my mind is enraptured. How can I join them and be with them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਜਨ ਮਨ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੇ ਲਾਇਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant sajan man mitr se laaein prabh siau rang jeeo |
lines.english: They are Saints and friends, good friends of my mind, who inspire me and help me tune in to God's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਤੁਟਈ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਭੰਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tina siau preet na tuttee kabahu na hovai bhang jeeo |1|
lines.english: My love for them shall never die; it shall never, ever be broken. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਿਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham prabh kar deaa gun gaavaa tere nit jeeo |
lines.english: O Supreme Lord God, please grant me Your Grace, that I might constantly sing Your Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਸਜਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹ ਮਨ ਮਿਤ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aae milahu sant sajanaa naam japah man mit jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Come, and meet with me, O Saints, and good friends; let us chant and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Best Friend of my mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੇ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਅੰਧੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: dekhai sune na jaanee maaeaa mohiaa andh jeeo |
lines.english: He does not see, he does not hear, and he does not understand; he is blind, enticed and bewitched by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਚੀ ਦੇਹਾ ਵਿਣਸਣੀ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਧੰਧੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaachee dehaa vinasanee koorr kamaavai dhandh jeeo |
lines.english: His body is false and transitory; it shall perish. And still, he entangles himself in false pursuits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਿਣਿ ਚਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਨਬੰਧੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaaveh se jin chale gur poore sanabandh jeeo |2|
lines.english: They alone depart victorious, who have meditated on the Naam; they stick with the Perfect Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਕਰੇ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: hukame parapanch pasariaa hukam kare ras bhog jeeo |
lines.english: By His Hukam, the Expanse of the Universe is expanded. By His Hukam, they enjoy pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ਚਲਣੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: hukame jug meh aaeaa chalan hukam sanjog jeeo |
lines.english: By the Hukam of God's Will, they come into this world, and they leave upon receipt of His Hukam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਰਤਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਾ ਸੋਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis no karataa visarai tiseh vichhorraa sog jeeo |3|
lines.english: One who forgets the Creator Lord, suffers sorrow and separation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਿਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapanarre prabh bhaaniaa daragah paidhaa jaae jeeo |
lines.english: One who is pleasing to his God, goes to His Court dressed in robes of honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ਇਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aithai sukh mukh ujalaa iko naam dhiaae jeeo |
lines.english: One who meditates on the Naam, the One Name, finds peace in this world; his face is radiant and bright.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahiaa sarab jeea pratipaal jeeo |
lines.english: He is pervading and permeating the spaces and interspaces; He loves and cherishes all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਰੁ ਦਿਤਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸਤ ਭਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aadar ditaa paarabraham gur seviaa sat bhaae jeeo |4|
lines.english: The Supreme Lord confers honor and respect on those who serve the Guru with true love. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤੇ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: man te kabahu na veesarai jaa aape hoe deaal jeeo |5|
lines.english: I shall never forget Him from my mind, since He has been so merciful to me. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach khajaanaa sanchiaa ek naam dhan maal jeeo |
lines.english: I have accumulated the true treasure, the wealth and riches of the One Name.
